title: polypodium vulgare subsp. zuvandicum
intro: Polypodium vulgare subsp. zuvandicum, also known as the common polypody or rock polypody, is a subspecies of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Polypodium vulgare subsp. zuvandicum include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and powdering the leaves, which can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
